nasb.text: So then you are no longer strangers and aliens, but you are fellow citizens with the saints, and are of God’s household,

esv.text: So then you are no longer strangers and aliens, but you are fellow citizens with the saints and members of the household of God,

cnv.text: 這樣看來，你們不再是外人和客旅，而是與聖徒一同作國民，是　神家裡的人了，

ccb.text: 从此，你们不再是外人或过客，你们与众圣徒一样是天国的子民，是上帝家里的人了。

csbs.text: 由此可见，你们不再是外人，或寄居的；你们是圣徒的同国之民，是神家里的人，
